description: Import data from a formatted Excel report into Epi Info 7. Create a new project named 'LabImport' at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Epi Info 7\Projects\LabImport' using a SQLite Database. Import 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VirologyReport.xlsx' into a table named 'LabResults'. The Excel file contains header information in the first 3 rows, with actual data headers starting on Row 4. Ensure the imported table uses the column names 'SpecimenID', 'PatientID', 'CollectionDate', 'TestResult', and 'CtValue'.
